ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jul-01-2024 Off Calendar

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar May-15-2024 Continued To Jul-23-24 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

DEMURRER to COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Apr-26-2024 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Hearing Re: DEFENDANT JACKOVICS ENTERPRISES, INC.'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT.

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling as follows:

Defendant's unopposed Demurrer to Complaint is sustained without leave to amend.

Defendant shall submit a proposed order with the tentative ruling's exact language by 9:00 am on April 26, 2024.

Order signed.

Judge: Rochelle C. East; Clerk: Jacqueline Alameda; Bailiff: Jamie; Not Reported. (302/RCE)
